zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton於1334年出生在英國武斯特斯爾厄普頓 斯諾斯波利時，他的父親Thomas de Westcote  de Lyttleton29歲，母親Lucia Du Bois24歲。他於1354年與Julian de Somery在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lyttlelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Littleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, mostly in southwestern England, named in Old English as ‘small settlement’, from lȳtel ‘small’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Westcote
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: West, the west, and cote, a cottage, meaning a western cottage

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton was born in 1334, in Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, England, his father, Thomas de Westcote  de Lyttleton, was 29 and his mother, Lucia Du Bois, was 24. He married Julian de Somery in 1354, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1375, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton est né en 1334, à Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Westcote  de Lyttleton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lucia Du Bois, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Julian de Somery en 1354, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1375, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Westcote de Lyttleltonが1334年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウプトン スノドスブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Westcote  de Lyttletonは29歳，母Lucia Du Boisは24歳であった。1354年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーでJulian de Someryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton(이)가 1334년 영국 워스스터실르 업턴 스노드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Westcote  de Lyttleton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia Du Bois(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1354년 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 Julian de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton родился в 1334 г. в местности уптон снодсбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Westcote  de Lyttleton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia Du Bois, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian de Somery в 1354 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1375 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
